core_summary.summary: Follow Builders 记录到 Matt Turck（@mattturck） 在 X 上的最新动态。简介：VC at @FirstMarkCap. Host: MAD Podcast; Organizer: Data Driven NYC, Author: MAD Landscape.。要点：1. when I ask my AI agent to “make no mistakes” https://t.co/HTMnW0h8OX

evidence_points: when I ask my AI agent to “make no mistakes”

{"builder": {"source": "x", "name": "Nikunj Kothari", "handle": "nikunj", "bio": "partner @fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire @meter, @opendoor, @atlassian & others. love @shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧", "tweets": [{"id": "2073903310982218088", "text": "Still waiting on that one founder who gates a VC chat until they have played with the product and come with at least two pieces of feedback..

Blows my mind that people go on Zoom and chat for 30 mins on a parroted deck for literally the entire day - where it could have been a significantly more productive conversation if you just did a product brainstorm instead. Or even better just spend the entire time getting to know each other. 

Am I just weird? Like how do you (both founders while fundraising and VCs generally) do this all day? What alpha do you get from hearing the same story again? Trying to see if we can set up play dates with local families - DM if that’s you!", "createdAt": "2026-07-05T16:18:04.000Z", "url": "https://x.com/nikunj/status/2073803608722939935", "likes": 134, "retweets": 1, "replies": 47, "isQuote": false, "quotedTweetId": null}]}, "tweets": [{"id": "2073903310982218088", "text": "Still waiting on that one founder who gates a VC chat until they have played with the product and come with at least two pieces of feedback..

Am I just weird? Like how do you (both founders while fundraising and VCs generally) do this all day? What alpha do you get from hearing the same story again? {"builder": {"source": "x", "name": "Cat Wu", "handle": "_catwu", "bio": "claude code + cowork @anthropicai, prev: @dagster, @scale_ai", "tweets": [{"id": "2073806626965049686", "text": "what are your top claude code + workflows + artifacts use cases?

one of my new favorites is for sourcing candidates:
- tell cc about the role and backgrounds i’m looking for
- ask cc to kick off a dynamic workflow to find 100 candidates, and include linkedin, twitter, blog, podcasts, and one-line pitch for each
- ask cc to make an artifact and email it to me. then, i lock my laptop and head out for the day
- i review the list on the go once cc is done!", "createdAt": "2026-07-05T16:30:03.000Z", "url": "https://x.com/_catwu/status/2073806626965049686", "likes": 555, "retweets": 22, "replies": 92, "isQuote": false, "quotedTweetId": null}]}, "tweets": [{"id": "2073806626965049686", "text": "what are your top claude code + workflows + artifacts use cases?

- ask cc to kick off a dynamic workflow to find 100 candidates, and include linkedin, twitter, blog, podcasts, and one-line pitch for each
- ask cc to make an artifact and email it to me. then, i lock my laptop and head out for the day
- i review the list on the go once cc is done!", "createdAt": "2026-07-05T16:30:03.000Z", "url": "https://x.com/_catwu/status/2073806626965049686", "likes": 555, "retweets": 22, "replies": 92, "isQuote": false, "quotedTweetId": null}]}

{"builder": {"source": "x", "name": "Nikunj Kothari", "handle": "nikunj", "bio": "partner @fpvventures - investing in seed/A. previous: early hire @meter, @opendoor, @atlassian & others. love @shimoleejhaveri + 👦👧", "tweets": [{"id": "2073903310982218088", "text": "Still waiting on that one founder who gates a VC chat until they have played with the product and come with at least two pieces of feedback..

Blows my mind that people go on Zoom and chat for 30 mins on a parroted deck for literally the entire day - where it could have been a significantly more productive conversation if you just did a product brainstorm instead. Or even better just spend the entire time getting to know each other. 

Am I just weird? Like how do you (both founders while fundraising and VCs generally) do this all day? What alpha do you get from hearing the same story again? events.raw_text:
{"builder": {"source": "x", "name": "Cat Wu", "handle": "_catwu", "bio": "claude code + cowork @anthropicai, prev: @dagster, @scale_ai", "tweets": [{"id": "2073806626965049686", "text": "what are your top claude code + workflows + artifacts use cases?

one of my new favorites is for sourcing candidates:
- tell cc about the role and backgrounds i’m looking for
- ask cc to kick off a dynamic workflow to find 100 candidates, and include linkedin, twitter, blog, podcasts, and one-line pitch for each
- ask cc to make an artifact and email it to me. then, i lock my laptop and head out for the day
- i review the list on the go once cc is done!", "createdAt": "2026-07-05T16:30:03.000Z", "url": "https://x.com/_catwu/status/2073806626965049686", "likes": 555, "retweets": 22, "replies": 92, "isQuote": false, "quotedTweetId": null}]}, "tweets": [{"id": "2073806626965049686", "text": "what are your top claude code + workflows + artifacts use cases?

one of my new favorites is for sourcing candidates:
